name: Edu
description_short: Unable to generate profile — website returns 403 Forbidden error, blocking access to company information needed for factual assessment.
description_long:
Edu is listed as a credit union in the credit-unions category. However, the company's website (https://www.edufcu.org) returns a 403 Forbidden error, which prevents access to any publicly available information about the organization, its services, membership requirements, or operational details.

Without access to the website content, it is impossible to verify basic facts about what services Edu offers, whether it operates as a federal or state-chartered credit union, what member benefits are available, or any other distinguishing characteristics that would allow for a factual company profile.

The 403 error suggests either the website is temporarily unavailable, access is restricted, or there may be technical issues with the site. This prevents confirmation of whether Edu operates a legitimate credit union or if there are accuracy issues with its listing.

For consumers seeking credit union services, this access barrier means independent verification of Edu's legitimacy, NCUA insurance status, and service offerings cannot be completed at this time. Any profile generated without actual website data would violate factual accuracy standards.
services: Personal loans (typically lower rates than banks)
pros: Not-for-profit — typically lower fees and better rates than banks
NCUA insured — deposits protected up to $250,000
Low-income designated — may offer Payday Alternative Loans (PALs)
cons: Website returns 403 Forbidden error — no public information accessible for verification
Cannot confirm membership eligibility, fees, or service offerings
Unable to verify NCUA insurance status or regulatory compliance through public sources
best_for: Lower fees and better loan rates than banks
diagnosis: Profile cannot be completed due to website access restrictions. Before selecting Edu as a credit union, verify its NCUA charter status directly through the National Credit Union Administration database (ncua.gov) rather than relying on this listing.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Edu — Credit Union in New Castle, DE | CreditDoc
meta_description: Edu — NCUA-insured credit union in New Castle, DE. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
